parameters.jsCode:
const report = {
  workflow: 'llm-comparison',
  runId: $json.runId,
  period: $json.period,
  status: 'starter-template',
  purpose: 'Compare GPT and Claude contract parsing, then compare invoice math against maker output.',
  requiredInputs: [
    'raw contract text from S3',
    'transaction data for the last full month',
    'maker invoice output from the billing app',
    'GPT parse JSON',
    'Claude parse JSON'
  ],
  requiredChecks: [
    'contract term diff',
    'fee rule diff',
    'invoice amount diff',
    'missing or ambiguous term review',
    'maker-vs-checker delta review'
  ],
  epsilon: $json.epsilon,
  reportDestinationPrefix: $json.reportDestinationPrefix,
  nextAction: 'Wire the model nodes and deterministic compare step, then write the report to S3 and alert Finance on any mismatch.'
};
return [{ json: report }];
